---
title: "Contact"
subtitle: "Let's talk about your data."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
---

We respond to inquiries within one business day.

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### Get in touch

::: {.contact-item}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-envelope .contact-icon}
**Email**
[batemanb@tidelandsanalytics.com](mailto:batemanb@tidelandsanalytics.com)
:::

::: {.contact-item}
[]{.fa-solid .fa-phone .contact-icon}
**Phone**
[(803) 236-3653](tel:8032363653)
:::


:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### What to include

The fastest way to get a useful response is to share a bit about:

- What you're trying to accomplish
- The kind of data you're working with
- Any tools you're already using (Excel, SQL, R, etc.)
- Your timeline, if you have one

Don't worry about getting it perfect — we'll fill in the gaps on a call.

:::

:::

---

::: {.text-center .my-5}

[Email us now](mailto:batemanb@tidelandsanalytics.com){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}

:::
